description_long: This is a polygonal wooden bucket with a faceted, almost barrel-like body, constructed from vertical wooden staves. The wood has a medium brown, slightly weathered texture, giving it a rustic appearance. The base is reinforced with a thick, black band, likely made of metal, which adds structural stability and visual contrast. A single, angular wooden handle is attached to one side, designed for easy gripping and carrying. The interior is hollow, with the same wood texture visible inside, and the rim is wide and open, suitable for holding liquids or small items. There are no visible markings, labels, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A rustic, faceted wooden bucket with a black metal base band and a single angular wooden handle. The open top and sturdy construction make it suitable for carrying or holding items.
description_view_0: The bucket is shown with its angular wooden handle clearly visible on the right, highlighting the faceted wood texture and the black metal base.
description_view_1: This view centers the handle attachment, showing the flat wooden panel where the handle meets the bucket and the uninterrupted black base band.
description_view_2: The handle is visible on the left, with the bucket's open top and faceted wooden sides prominent, and the black base band encircling the bottom.
description_view_3: The bucket is shown from the opposite side of the handle, displaying only the faceted wooden body and black base, with no handle visible.
